channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: iGarden Swim Jet X Pro 10 Review: Endless Pool
item.description: Swimming against the iGarden Swim Jet X Pro 10’s artificial current is a real workout, even if it doesn’t quite replace a full-size lap pool.

item.title: I watched the highly anticipated Evil Dead Burn but the horror movie relies too heavily on gore and neglects the lore
item.description: Evil Dead Burn left me with more questions than answers, and ultimately, it's the weakest in the franchise for me.

item.title: Europe takes step toward social media ban for kids
item.description: Following a worrying new report, Europe is taking steps toward barring children from using social media.

item.title: OpenAI shuts down its Atlas browser after not even a year
item.description: OpenAI sunsets its Atlas browser, but the latest version of ChatGPT for desktop could just be that hotly anticipated 'superapp'.

item.title: From typos to deepfakes: the new AI cybersecurity battleground
item.description: Generative AI makes prepping sophisticated attack flows available with just a few keystrokes.

item.title: It’s the perfect time of year for grabbing a cheap radio for the garden, and they don’t come much cuter, more packed with features or wallet-friendly than this
item.description: The Majority Mini Shelford is a compact, cheap, portable radio with screen that goes on sale in August.

item.title: Python Is So Slow. Can Julia Solve the Two-Language Problem?
item.description: By some benchmarks, Julia code can run 10X to 1,000X faster than Python—but there’s a reason it’s not a very popular programming language.

item.title: Express AI review
item.description: Express AI is a private AI chat platform built by ExpressVPN, offering five models, end-to-end encryption, and zero data retention for Pro subscribers.

item.title: Tesla perd son pactole des crédits carbone : le bénéfice par voiture s’effondre à 2 140 $
item.description: Tesla reste l'un des constructeurs généraliste qui gagne le plus par voiture vendue, mais l’écart avec Toyota fond à vue d’œil. En cause : la fin d’un business ultra-rentable adossé aux normes CO2 européennes.

item.title: Anthropic a une bonne nouvelle pour les abonnés Claude
item.description: Anthropic prolonge une nouvelle fois l’accès gratuit à son modèle haut de gamme Fable 5 pour les offres payantes. Les abonnés pourront l’utiliser sans surcoût jusqu’au 19 juillet 2026. C'est déjà la troisième fois que la start-up prolonge cette période promotionnelle.

item.title: Lumo AI review
item.description: Lumo is Proton's privacy-first AI assistant with zero-access encryption, no data logging, and open-source models at a price below ChatGPT Plus.

item.title: I tested Meta's new AI image generator against ChatGPT and Nano Banana 2 using the same 5 prompts — and the winner surprised me
item.description: In my battle of image generators, some models understood the assignment better than others.

item.title: La plainte d’Apple tombe à un très mauvais moment pour OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI vise l'une des plus grosses entrées en Bourse de l'histoire de la tech. La plainte d'Apple pour vol de secrets tombe ainsi au pire moment.

item.title: Why your security stack might be guarding the wrong door
item.description: Organizations must shift security into the browser itself, taking the focus from access to action.

item.title: Can't find a fan? Don't panic — as a home tech expert, I've tracked down 7 premium models that are still in stock from Dyson, Shark, and Meaco for delivery this week
item.description: The summer heat shows no sign of letting up, but there are still fans in stock from big names like Dyson, Shark, and Meaco — if you know where to look.

item.title: White Supremacists Love Armie Hammer’s New Movie
item.description: Described as the “feel-good movie of white-boy summer” by one extremist, the movie Citizen Vigilante has been hailed by the far-right as a way to convert moderates to their cause.

item.title: The hidden cybersecurity risk sitting in every SMB office
item.description: Printers remain cybersecurity’s overlooked weak link, putting sensitive SMB data at risk.

item.title: Doctolib veut utiliser vos données pour son IA, mais vous pouvez refuser
item.description: Doctolib, le service de réservation de rendez-vous médicaux, souhaite utiliser les données personnelles de ses utilisateurs pour alimenter un projet de recherche fondé sur l'intelligence artificielle. Il est possible de s'y opposer, à condition d'effectuer soi-même la démarche.

item.title: L’échec cuisant des surtaxes : les voitures électriques chinoises sont toujours 21 % moins chères en Europe
item.description: Deux ans après leur mise en place, les surtaxes européennes sur les voitures électriques chinoises ont bien freiné quelque chose. Mais un rapport de T&E montre que les modèles chinois restent 21 % moins chers, et que le vrai frein est peut-être ailleurs.

item.title: Comment transformer votre TV en système home cinéma avec deux Google Home Speaker
item.description: Google propose désormais une intégration native entre ses enceintes connectées et son boîtier TV, permettant de profiter d’une configuration que l’on peut comparer à une barre de son. Voici comment faire, et ce que vaut vraiment cette configuration.

item.title: Le Samsung Galaxy Book 5 Pro chute à 880 € au lieu de 1 410 €, l’affaire des soldes pour un ultrabook encore premium
item.description: Fin, léger et puissant grâce à son Intel Core Ultra 7, le Samsung Galaxy Book 5 Pro reste un excellent ultrabook. La bonne nouvelle, c'est que depuis l'arrivée de son successeur, son prix a fondu : pendant les soldes, Darty et Rakuten le proposent à 879,99 euros au lieu de 1 409,99 euros.

item.title: Duck.ai by DuckDuckGo review
item.description: Duck.ai offers private, no-login AI chat through DuckDuckGo, with six free models and paid tiers that unlock GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.7, and more.

item.title: Lidl customers across Europe hit in suspected data breach - here's what we know
item.description: Lidl customers in three countries have had some of their data stolen - but so far, it hasn't surfaced anywhere.

item.title: On a vu la borne Clelia, une étonnante solution pour recharger son vélo électrique sans craindre le vol
item.description: Solution de stationnement sécurisé à destination des commerces, collectivités ou des entreprises, la borne Clelia veut renforcer la sérénité des cyclistes, et leur permettre de recharger la batterie de leur vélo. On a pu la voir de près.

item.title: Why AI infrastructure costs keep surprising IT leaders
item.description: Production AI changes infrastructure economics in ways most teams underestimate.

item.title: Pixel 11 Pro Fold : une fuite dévoile l’une des versions avant l’annonce de Google
item.description: Le Pixel 11 Pro Fold sera dévoilé dans un mois, mais nous avons déjà un aperçu du nouveau téléphone pliant de Google, et plus précisément du modèle « Pine ». Pas de révolution annoncée au niveau du design, mais une nouvelle couleur vert sapin et un flash particulièrement volumineux qui pourrait intégrer la fonction Pixel Glow.

item.title: A Leak of San Francisco Police Drone Footage Exposes the New Reality of Urban Surveillance
item.description: The SFPD’s exposure of hours of videos from drone platform Skydio reveals how broadly it’s watching the city from above—and how the results can spill online.

item.title: This free Mac app reveals the truth about your mystery USB-C cables
item.description: Nearly three years ago, I showed you an awesome $8 cable tester that quickly tells you if your USB-C cable is likely fast, slow, powerful, or weak. Sadly, that gadget got discontinued, and I've never found anything as intuitive or inexpensive since. But if you've got a Mac with Apple Silicon chips, you can simply […]

item.title: Break out of the Spotify echo chamber with these music discovery gold mines
item.description: Listen up: These completely free websites will refresh your playlists—and refresh your mind. If there’s one thing that gets me as giddy as gadgets, it’s music.

item.title: How an army of digital sleuths are using AI to fix America’s crumbling sidewalks
item.description: Project Sidewalk pairs machine learning and community engagement to map—and improve—sidewalk accessibility. I’m on a tree-lined street in Lincoln Park, a city in Metro Detroit, studying a curb ramp—the part of the sidewalk that slopes down to meet the street at an intersection so that someone using a wheelchair can safely cross. I mark the ramp “good” and move on....

item.title: This new AI model thinks in images, not just words
item.description: Elorian, founded by the ex-Google Brain and DeepMind researcher Andrew Dai, believes that learning from, and reasoning about, images is fundamental to rapid intelligence gains. For almost a decade, AI researchers have been obsessed with one kind of artificial intelligence—large language models (LLMs), which they train to write, talk, and reason using words. The tech industry is making an enormous bet that making such models bigger and smarter is the path to superintelligence. ...

item.title: Design history, as told through 125 objects
item.description: Cooper Hewitt’s new permanent collection exhibition is meant to be a conversation starter. From the pillow that determines whether a night is restful or not, to the mug that keeps the coffee from burning your hands, the streets and transit systems that get you to work, and the city you inhabit—everything is design. And no one understands that more than the Cooper Hewitt....

item.title: On a vu le MG Cyber Concept : bientôt un SUV électrique MG au look de Ferrari pour une fraction du prix
item.description: MG vient de dévoiler un concept-car préfigurant un futur SUV électrique haut de gamme : voici le MG Cyber Concept, aux lignes inspirées du Ferrari Purosangue ou du Xiaomi YU7. Nous sommes partis à sa découverte.

item.title: DeepSeek AI review
item.description: DeepSeek delivers frontier-class AI performance at a fraction of competitor prices, but serious privacy concerns make it a complicated choice for businesses.

item.title: Microsoft admits its carbon emissions grew 25 percent in 2025, including a rise in fossil fuel use
item.description: Microsoft is the latest hyperscaler to blame AI for rising emissions, at 25%, following similar rises from Google (25%) and Amazon (16%).

item.title: Fin du disque : PlayStation va priver des dizaines de pays de jeux vidéo
item.description: Sony arrête la production de disques pour ses nouveaux jeux PlayStation en janvier 2028. Une conséquence méconnue en France : le PlayStation Network n'existe que dans une petite moitié des pays du monde, ce qui laisse des dizaines de nations sans porte d'entrée légale.

item.title: The DJI Mini 3 is back on sale at Amazon — act fast to save $180 on this beginner-friendly bundle
item.description: Find the best DJI drone deal. Save 25% on the DJI Mini 3 Fly More Combo at Amazon.

item.title: Best Kitchen Composters and Food Recyclers (2026)
item.description: Responsibly dispose of your food scraps with one of these indoor, (mostly) odor-free, WIRED-tested devices.

item.title: AI has a constraint problem
item.description: Let’s get back to what we as designers have always known: Limits don’t rein in possibility, they enable it. March 2026 was a rocky month for big tech. On March 18, Meta decided to wind down support for Horizon Worlds, the last bastion of its five-year, $70 billion-plus virtual reality bet and the flagship project of its rebrand from Facebook. Eight days later, OpenAI announced it was shuttering Sora, its AI video platform, at a much smaller loss (most estimates put it at a mere $1 billion)....

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Draft Night Box hits record-low price on Amazon — save over $20
item.description: Save $21 on the Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Draft Night box at Amazon, now at its lowest price yet.

item.title: Social media limits are coming for teens across Europe
item.description: The European Union is weighing sweeping new restrictions on children's and teenagers' access to social media, including age limits, an outright ban, and phased access. Social media platforms could also be forced to prove their services are not harmful before young people are allowed to use them. European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said […]...

item.title: AI can read your legacy systems. Modernization is still the hard part
item.description: As AI makes legacy estates easier to understand, the challenge shifts to sequencing change without disrupting critical operations.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Chaos Rising Elite Trainer Box has dropped to a new record-low price on Amazon — save over $40
item.description: Save $40.99 on the Pokémon TCG Chaos Rising Elite Trainer Box at Amazon, now at its lowest price ever.

item.title: Pourquoi votre vrai IBAN apparait dans cette vaste arnaque au faux abonnement Delta Sky Club
item.description: Une campagne d'arnaque exploite vicieusement les nombreux IBAN volés en France pour précipiter les victimes dans leur piège. Voici ce qu'il faut savoir.

item.title: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced : si le jeu est flou avec votre carte graphique Nvidia, voici la solution (en attendant un patch)
item.description: Les possesseurs de cartes graphiques Nvidia souffrent de deux bugs fâcheux lors de l'activation du DLSS dans Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced. Voici comment les corriger en attendant une mise à jour du jeu par Ubisoft.
